Maximum Number of Files to Track.name: Maximum Number of Files to Track
Maximum Number of Files to Track.displayName: Maximum Number of Files to Track

properties.transformed_data:
SELECT 
  order_id AS transaction_id, 
  customer_id, 
  CAST(
    CASE 
      WHEN price = 'FREE' THEN '0' 
      WHEN price LIKE 'ERROR%' THEN NULL 
      ELSE price 
    END AS DOUBLE
  ) AS amount 
FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL 
  AND order_id <> 'order_id'
  AND price IS NOT NULL
